import * as React from "react"
import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const badgeVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      variant: "default",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        display: "inline-flex",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        borderWidth: "border",
        padding: ["px-2.5", "py-0.5"],
        fontSize: "text-xs",
        fontWeight: "font-semibold",
        transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
        focus: {
            outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
            boxShadow: ["focus:ring-2", "focus:ring-ring", "focus:ring-offset-2"],
        },
    },
    variants: {
        variant: {
            default: {
                borderColor: "border-transparent",
                backgroundColor: "bg-primary",
                color: "text-primary-foreground",
                boxShadow: "shadow",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-primary/80",
                },
            },
            secondary: {
                borderColor: "border-transparent",
                backgroundColor: "bg-secondary",
                color: "text-secondary-foreground",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-secondary/80",
                },
            },
            destructive: {
                borderColor: "border-transparent",
                backgroundColor: "bg-destructive",
                color: "text-destructive-foreground",
                boxShadow: "shadow",
                hover: {
                    backgroundColor: "hover:bg-destructive/80",
                },
            },
            outline: {
                color: "text-foreground",
            },
        },
    },
})

export interface BadgeProps
  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> {}

function Badge({ className, variant, ...props }: BadgeProps) {
  return (
    <div className={tw.join(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)} {...props} />
  )
}

export { Badge, badgeVariants }
